The Nutcracker and the Four Realms (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $54,858,851Details
International Box Office $115,165,449
Worldwide Box Office $170,024,300
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,277,447
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,556,158
Total $10,833,605
Further financial details...

Synopsis

All Clara wants is a key—a one-of-a-kind key that will unlock a box that holds a priceless gift from her late mother. A golden thread, presented to her at godfather Drosselmeyer’s annual holiday party, leads her to the coveted key, which promptly disappears into a strange and mysterious parallel world. It’s there that Clara encounters a soldier named Phillip, a gang of mice and the regents who preside over three Realms: Land of Snowflakes, Land of Flowers and Land of Sweets. Clara and Phillip must brave the ominous Fourth Realm, home to the tyrant Mother Ginger, to retrieve Clara’s key and hopefully return harmony to the unstable world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,352,491 (37.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.70 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$132,900,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,766 opening theaters/3,766 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $72,019,077

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 2nd, 2018 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: October 31st, 2018 (Wide), released as Lo schiaccianoci e i quattro regni (Italy)
November 1st, 2018 (Wide) (Germany)

Synopsis

All Clara wants is a key—a one-of-a-kind key that will unlock a box that holds a priceless gift from her late mother. A golden thread, presented to her at godfather Drosselmeyer’s annual holiday party, leads her to the coveted key, which promptly disappears into a strange and mysterious parallel world. It’s there that Clara encounters a soldier named Phillip, a gang of mice and the regents who preside over three Realms: Land of Snowflakes, Land of Flowers and Land of Sweets. Clara and Phillip must brave the ominous Fourth Realm, home to the tyrant Mother Ginger, to retrieve Clara’s key and hopefully return harmony to the unstable world.
